description: Detects numeric literals outside const/constexpr/enum/macro contexts in C++ that should be named constants. Simplified from Rust: flags all number_literal nodes (info severity) without exempt-value filtering (0, 1, 2, powers-of-2), context exemptions (const, constexpr, enum, #define, case labels, template args), suffix normalization, or NOLINT suppression. Higher false-positive rate.

flag.message: Numeric literal detected -- consider extracting to a named constant (constexpr or const variable) for readability and maintainability
